task_commands.name: Сборка проекта (iOS Simulator)
task_commands.command: xcodebuild build -project App/Vreader/Vreader.xcodeproj -scheme Vreader -destination "platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16" -quiet 2>&1 | tail -10
task_commands.stdout: xcode-select: error: tool 'xcodebuild' requires Xcode, but active developer directory '/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools' is a command line tools instance

task_commands.name: Проверка check_refs.py
task_commands.stdout:
✅ Все API совместимы с iOS 17+
✅ Проект чист — можно публиковать

task_commands.name: Запуск UI-тестов (интеграция NetworkMonitor)
task_commands.command: xcodebuild test -project App/Vreader/Vreader.xcodeproj -scheme Vreader -destination "platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16" -only-testing:VreaderUITests/VreaderUITests/testNetworkMonitorInitialized -quiet 2>&1 | tail -20
task_commands.stdout: xcode-select: error: tool 'xcodebuild' requires Xcode, but active developer directory '/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools' is a command line tools instance

task_commands.name: Запуск Launch-теста (скриншот при старте)
task_commands.command: xcodebuild test -project App/Vreader/Vreader.xcodeproj -scheme Vreader -destination "platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16" -only-testing:VreaderUITests/VreaderUITestsLaunchTests/testLaunch -quiet 2>&1 | tail -20
task_commands.stdout: xcode-select: error: tool 'xcodebuild' requires Xcode, but active developer directory '/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools' is a command line tools instance

task_commands.name: Поиск запрещённых паттернов (coverData, isPremium в CloudKit)
task_commands.command: grep -rn "coverData:" App/Vreader/Vreader/ --include="*.swift" | grep -v "//"; grep -rn "isPremium" App/Vreader/Vreader/ --include="*.swift" | grep -v "//" | grep -i "cloudkit\|ckrecord" || echo "OK"
